title: koniga pyrenaica
intro: Koniga pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean konigia or Pyrenean mayweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Koniga pyrenaica include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Koniga pyrenaica can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
